title: Doctor Phase 0 handoff and commit prep opened
body: Stratospheric Whirling Airstream opened claim 274d975e-325e-45bd-b946-b6927c0b33fa for the owner-requested jc-session-handoff after Memory/state contract doctor Phase 0. Scope is continuity handoff and commit preparation only: repo-continuity, the agentic-engineering thread record, napkin, generated shared comms log, and collaboration claim closure state. Phase 1 fixtures and implementation remain out of scope.
